description: Maps historical/legacy tickers to their current canonical symbol so trades and holdings reconcile across instrument renames and US->UCITS migrations. 'resolve' gives the flat old->current lookup (use this for reconciliation). 'history' documents the full rename chain and the reason.

history.reason: Migrated US-domiciled VOO to iShares S&P 500 UCITS (SXR8.DE) for Spain/UCITS compliance
Migrated US-domiciled QQQ to Invesco NASDAQ-100 UCITS (EQQQ.DE)
SPDR Gold Trust (GLD) -> Invesco Physical Gold ETC (SGLD.L) -> Xetra-Gold ETC (4GLD.DE)
